The "'''Tipper'''" was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] businessman-turned-[[Slicer/Legends|hacker]]. He called himself "Tipper" because he had found a way to "tip" the contents of other people's [[Bank/Legends|bank]] accounts into his own. He founded the gang of the [[Computer/Legends|computer]] hackers known as the [[Skaak Tippers]].<ref name="CDHZ" />
